project.name: TechNova Solutions — Client Project Management Platform

epics.description: Core project tracking, task management, milestone tracking, and Kanban/list views to replace spreadsheet-based project tracking.

user_stories.title: As a Project Manager, I want to view a centralized dashboard of all active projects so that I can monitor status, deadlines, and team assignments at a glance
user_stories.description: Implement a centralized project dashboard displaying all active projects with their current status, assigned team members, deadlines, and completion percentages. The dashboard must support filtering, sorting, and real-time status indicators for 40+ active client projects.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN I am a logged-in Project Manager WHEN I navigate to the project dashboard THEN I see all active projects with status, team, deadline, and completion percentage columns
GIVEN the dashboard is displayed WHEN I click on a column header THEN the projects are sorted by that column in ascending/descending order
GIVEN the dashboard is displayed WHEN I apply filters by status, client, or team member THEN only matching projects are shown
GIVEN a project status changes WHEN another user updates it THEN the dashboard reflects the change within 5 seconds without a full page refresh

tasks.title: Build project dashboard REST API with filtering, sorting, and pagination
Implement project dashboard UI with data table, filters, and real-time indicators
Write E2E tests for dashboard filtering, sorting, pagination, and real-time updates

user_stories.title: As an Administrator, I want to create, edit, and archive projects with configurable fields so that project records are complete and organized
user_stories.description: Enable project CRUD operations with configurable fields including project name, client, start date, deadline, budget, assigned team, and project phases/milestones. Archived projects remain searchable but hidden from active views.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN I am an Administrator WHEN I click 'Create Project' THEN I see a form with all configurable fields (name, client, dates, budget, team, phases)
GIVEN a project exists WHEN I edit any field and save THEN the changes are persisted and reflected in the dashboard immediately
GIVEN a completed project WHEN I click 'Archive' THEN it is hidden from the active dashboard but remains accessible via search
GIVEN I search for an archived project WHEN I view its details THEN all historical data including tasks, milestones, and time entries are preserved

tasks.title: Build Project domain model and CRUD REST APIs with validation
Implement project creation wizard and edit forms with field validation
Test project CRUD operations, archival, and search for archived projects

user_stories.title: As a Team Member, I want to manage tasks within projects with status tracking and dependencies so that I can organize and track my work
user_stories.description: Implement task management with creation, assignment, due dates, status tracking (To Do, In Progress, In Review, Done), and predecessor/successor dependencies.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN I am within a project WHEN I create a task THEN I can assign it to team members, set a due date, and add a description
GIVEN a task exists WHEN I change its status THEN only valid transitions are allowed (e.g., To Do -> In Progress, In Progress -> In Review)
GIVEN Task B depends on Task A WHEN Task A is not yet Done THEN Task B shows a dependency warning if moved to In Progress
GIVEN I am a Project Manager WHEN I view the task list THEN I can see all tasks with their status, assignee, due date, and dependency indicators

tasks.title: Build Task domain model, status workflow engine, and dependency graph logic
Implement task list view with inline editing, status transitions, and dependency indicators
Test task workflow transitions, dependency validation, and edge cases

user_stories.title: As a Project Manager, I want to define milestones with target dates and client approval requirements so that I can track project progress against key deliverables
user_stories.description: Implement milestone definition within projects with configurable names, target dates, deliverable associations, and client approval flags. Milestones requiring client approval trigger notifications.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN I am a Project Manager WHEN I create a milestone THEN I can set a name, target date, link deliverables, and toggle client approval requirement
GIVEN a milestone requires client approval WHEN it is marked complete THEN the client receives a notification and the milestone cannot be finalized until approved
GIVEN a Client User receives an approval request WHEN they approve the milestone THEN it is marked as approved with a timestamp
GIVEN milestones exist WHEN I view the project timeline THEN all milestones display with their status (pending, awaiting approval, approved, overdue)

tasks.title: Build Milestone service with approval state machine and notification triggers
Implement milestone timeline component and approval UI
Test milestone approval flows, notifications, and edge cases

user_stories.title: As a Team Member, I want to use a Kanban board with drag-and-drop to move tasks between status columns so that I can visually manage my workflow
user_stories.description: Provide Kanban and list views for task management within each project, allowing team members to drag-and-drop tasks between status columns with real-time updates.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN I am viewing a project WHEN I toggle to Kanban view THEN I see tasks organized in columns by status (To Do, In Progress, In Review, Done)
GIVEN I am in Kanban view WHEN I drag a task from one column to another THEN the task status updates in real time for all viewers
GIVEN I am in Kanban view WHEN I toggle to list view THEN I see the same tasks in a tabular format with sorting and filtering
GIVEN another user moves a task WHEN I am viewing the Kanban board THEN the change is reflected without a page refresh

tasks.title: Build Kanban board API endpoints with real-time status update support via WebSocket
Implement Kanban board UI with drag-and-drop and list view toggle
Test Kanban drag-and-drop across browsers and real-time sync between users

epics.description: Client-facing portal with project dashboards, deliverable review, milestone approvals, messaging, and email notifications.

user_stories.title: As a Client User, I want to log in to a dedicated portal and view my project dashboard so that I can check project status without contacting the team
user_stories.description: Provide a dedicated client-facing portal where client users can log in, view their project dashboard, see overall project status, and access project-specific information with strict data isolation.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN I am a Client User WHEN I log in to the client portal THEN I see only projects belonging to my organization
GIVEN I am on my client dashboard WHEN I view project details THEN I see status, milestones, recent activity, and upcoming deadlines
GIVEN I am a Client User WHEN I attempt to access another client's project THEN I receive an access denied error
GIVEN I am a Client User WHEN I navigate the portal THEN the UI is distinct from the internal application with a client-friendly theme

tasks.title: Build client portal API layer with tenant isolation middleware
Build client portal UI shell with separate theme and client dashboard
Test client data isolation with cross-tenant access penetration tests

user_stories.title: As a Client User, I want to view and download deliverables and approve or request revisions on milestones so that I can provide timely feedback
user_stories.description: Allow client users to view and download deliverables associated with their projects, and to approve or request revisions on milestones through the portal with optional comments.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN I am a Client User WHEN I navigate to a milestone THEN I see associated deliverables with download links
GIVEN a deliverable is available WHEN I click 'Download' THEN the file downloads successfully
GIVEN a milestone requires my approval WHEN I click 'Approve' THEN the milestone status updates and the team is notified
GIVEN a milestone requires my approval WHEN I click 'Request Revision' THEN I must enter a comment explaining the required changes

tasks.title: Build deliverable approval state machine and notification triggers for client actions
Implement deliverable review interface with download, approve, and revision request UI
Test deliverable approval workflow including edge cases and notification delivery

user_stories.title: As a Client User, I want to communicate with my project team through threaded messages so that all project discussions are centralized
user_stories.description: Provide a messaging/communication feature within the client portal for project-scoped threaded conversations between client users and their dedicated project team.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN I am a Client User WHEN I open a project's messaging section THEN I see threaded conversations with the project team
GIVEN I am composing a message WHEN I type and send THEN the message appears in the thread and the team receives a notification
GIVEN a Team Member replies WHEN I return to the portal THEN I see the new reply in the conversation thread
GIVEN I am sending a message WHEN I attach a file THEN the file is uploaded and accessible within the thread

tasks.title: Build messaging service with WebSocket real-time delivery and file attachment support
Implement threaded messaging component with file attachment and real-time updates
Test messaging delivery, notifications, file attachments, and cross-browser behavior

user_stories.title: As a Client User, I want to view a Gantt-style timeline of my project showing milestones and progress so that I understand the project schedule
user_stories.description: Display a project timeline/Gantt-style visualization to client users showing milestone dates, current progress, and upcoming deliverables.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN I am a Client User WHEN I navigate to the timeline view THEN I see a Gantt chart with milestones, phases, and progress indicators
GIVEN the timeline is displayed WHEN I hover over a milestone THEN I see details including name, target date, status, and associated deliverables
GIVEN a project date changes WHEN I view the timeline THEN the updated dates are reflected automatically
GIVEN the current date is displayed WHEN I view the timeline THEN a 'today' marker shows the current position relative to the schedule

tasks.title: Build timeline data API aggregating milestones, phases, and progress metrics
Implement Gantt chart component with milestone markers and progress visualization
Test Gantt chart rendering accuracy, date updates, and responsiveness

user_stories.title: As a Client User, I want to receive automated email notifications for key project events so that I stay informed without logging in
user_stories.description: Send automated email notifications to client users for milestone completion, deliverable uploads, approval requests, and message replies, with configurable preferences.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN I am a Client User WHEN a milestone is completed THEN I receive an email notification with details
GIVEN I am a Client User WHEN a new deliverable is uploaded for my review THEN I receive an email with a direct link
GIVEN I am a Client User WHEN I configure my notification preferences THEN only selected event types trigger emails
GIVEN an email is sent WHEN I click a link in the email THEN I am directed to the relevant page in the client portal (with authentication)

tasks.title: Build email notification service with event-driven triggers and user preference management
Implement email notification preference settings UI in client portal
Test email delivery for all event types, preference enforcement, and link deep-linking

epics.description: Billable/non-billable time tracking with timers and manual entry, configurable billing rates, approval workflows, timesheet views, and automated invoice generation.

user_stories.title: As a Team Member, I want to log billable and non-billable hours using a start/stop timer or manual entry so that my time is accurately captured
user_stories.description: Provide time tracking where team members can log billable and non-billable hours against specific projects and tasks, with start/stop timer and manual entry options.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN I am a Team Member WHEN I start a timer against a task THEN the timer runs persistently across page navigation until I stop it
GIVEN I am a Team Member WHEN I manually enter time THEN I can specify date, hours, project, task, description, and billable/non-billable flag
GIVEN I have logged time entries WHEN I view my time log THEN I see all entries with project, task, hours, date, and billable status
GIVEN I am logging time WHEN I do not select a project and task THEN the system prevents submission and shows a validation error

tasks.title: Build time entry service with timer state management and manual entry APIs
Implement timer widget persistent across navigation and manual time entry form
Test timer accuracy, persistence, manual entry validation, and edge cases

user_stories.title: As a Finance Manager, I want the system to generate draft invoices from approved time entries so that billing is accurate and automated
user_stories.description: Automatically generate draft invoices from approved time entries, calculating totals based on project-specific billing rates, with support for manual adjustments before finalization.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN approved time entries exist WHEN I generate a draft invoice THEN line items are calculated using the correct billing rate hierarchy
GIVEN a draft invoice is generated WHEN I review it THEN I can adjust line items, add discounts, or add manual entries before finalizing
GIVEN I finalize an invoice WHEN the invoice is saved THEN it becomes immutable and receives a unique invoice number
GIVEN finalized invoices exist WHEN I view the invoice list THEN I see status (Draft, Finalized, Sent, Paid) and totals

tasks.title: Build invoice generation engine aggregating approved time entries with billing rate application
Implement invoice generation wizard with line item editing, adjustment, and finalization UI
Test invoice calculation accuracy against time entries and billing rates, immutability after finalization

user_stories.title: As an Administrator, I want to configure billing rates at global, client, and project levels so that invoicing reflects our pricing structure
user_stories.description: Support configurable billing rates per project, per team member role, and per client, with rate overrides at the project level taking precedence over defaults.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN I am an Administrator WHEN I set global billing rates by role THEN those rates apply as defaults for all clients and projects
GIVEN I am a Finance Manager WHEN I set a client-level rate override THEN it takes precedence over the global rate for that client
GIVEN I set a project-level rate WHEN time is logged against that project THEN the project rate takes precedence over both client and global rates
GIVEN multiple rate levels exist WHEN an invoice is generated THEN the system correctly applies the most specific rate (project > client > global)

tasks.title: Build billing rate hierarchy engine with cascading override logic
Implement billing rate configuration UI for global, client, and project levels
Test billing rate override precedence validation across all levels

user_stories.title: As a Team Lead, I want to review and approve time entries before they are included in invoices so that billing accuracy is ensured
user_stories.description: Provide time entry approval workflow where team leads or project managers review and approve time entries before invoice generation inclusion.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a Team Member submits time entries WHEN I am their approver THEN I see the entries in my approval queue
GIVEN I review a time entry WHEN I approve it THEN it is marked as approved and eligible for invoice generation
GIVEN I review a time entry WHEN I reject it THEN I must provide a reason and the Team Member is notified
GIVEN I reject a time entry WHEN the Team Member modifies and resubmits THEN it reappears in my approval queue

tasks.title: Build time entry approval workflow state machine with notification triggers
Implement approval queue view with approve, reject, and request modification actions
Test approval workflow edge cases including reject-resubmit cycles

user_stories.title: As a Team Member, I want to view weekly and monthly timesheets with project breakdowns so that I can track my utilization
user_stories.description: Provide timesheet views showing weekly and monthly summaries per team member with breakdown by project, billable vs. non-billable hours, and utilization percentage.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN I am a Team Member WHEN I view my timesheet THEN I see a weekly grid with daily hours broken down by project
GIVEN I am a Team Lead WHEN I view my team's timesheets THEN I see each member's weekly/monthly summary
GIVEN I toggle to monthly view WHEN viewing timesheets THEN I see the monthly summary with billable vs. non-billable breakdown
GIVEN I am viewing a timesheet WHEN I click export THEN I can download the data as CSV or PDF

tasks.title: Build timesheet aggregation queries with billable/non-billable breakdowns and export
Implement timesheet grid with weekly/monthly toggle and export functionality
Test timesheet calculation accuracy and export format validation

epics.description: Visual resource allocation board, team assignment management with capacity conflict detection, and capacity forecasting.

user_stories.title: As a Project Manager, I want to view a visual resource allocation board showing team utilization so that I can identify availability and overallocation
user_stories.description: Provide a visual resource allocation board showing all team members, their assigned projects, utilization rate, and availability windows with real-time updates.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN I am a Project Manager WHEN I open the resource board THEN I see all team members with their assigned projects and utilization percentage
GIVEN the resource board is displayed WHEN a team member is over 100% utilization THEN their row is visually highlighted as overallocated
GIVEN the resource board is displayed WHEN I filter by team or department THEN only matching members are shown
GIVEN assignments change WHEN I refresh the board THEN utilization percentages update to reflect current state

tasks.title: Build resource allocation query service with utilization calculations
Implement resource allocation board with utilization bars and availability indicators
Test resource utilization calculation accuracy and filter functionality

user_stories.title: As a Project Manager, I want to assign and reassign team members with conflict detection so that no one is overallocated
user_stories.description: Allow managers to assign and reassign team members to projects and tasks, with automatic conflict detection when a team member would exceed their capacity threshold.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN I am assigning a team member WHEN I drag-and-drop them to a project THEN the assignment is created and utilization updates
GIVEN I am assigning a team member WHEN the assignment would push them over 100% utilization THEN a warning is displayed
GIVEN a warning is displayed WHEN I choose to proceed anyway THEN the assignment is saved with an overallocation flag
GIVEN I need to reassign WHEN I move a member from one project to another THEN both projects' resource allocations update

tasks.title: Build resource assignment service with capacity threshold conflict detection
Implement drag-and-drop assignment UI with overallocation warnings
Test resource conflict detection edge cases and reassignment flows

user_stories.title: As a Team Lead, I want to view capacity forecasting for the next 4-12 weeks so that I can plan future project staffing
user_stories.description: Provide capacity forecasting showing projected team availability over the next 4-12 weeks based on current project schedules and assignments.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN I am a Team Lead WHEN I open the capacity forecast THEN I see projected utilization per team member for the next 4-12 weeks
GIVEN the forecast is displayed WHEN I adjust the time window slider THEN the view updates to show the selected period
GIVEN the forecast is displayed WHEN I filter by team, skill, or department THEN only matching members are shown
GIVEN current assignments change WHEN I refresh the forecast THEN projections update to reflect the new schedule

tasks.title: Build capacity forecasting engine using current schedule data with time window parameters
Implement capacity forecast chart with time window slider and team/skill/department filters
Test forecast accuracy against manual calculations and filter functionality

epics.description: Project document repository with version control, in-browser preview, commenting/annotation, and client approval workflows for deliverables.

user_stories.title: As a Team Member, I want to upload, download, preview, and organize documents in project folders so that all project files are centralized
user_stories.description: Provide a document management repository for each project with folder structures, supporting upload, download, in-browser preview, and deletion with appropriate permissions.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN I am within a project WHEN I navigate to documents THEN I see a folder structure with uploaded files
GIVEN I am uploading a document WHEN I select a file and target folder THEN the file uploads with a progress indicator
GIVEN a document is uploaded WHEN I click preview THEN common file types (PDF, images, Office docs) render in the browser
GIVEN I have appropriate permissions WHEN I delete a document THEN a confirmation dialog appears and the file is removed on confirmation

tasks.title: Build document storage service (S3-compatible) with folder CRUD and permission checks
Implement document manager UI with folder tree, upload progress, and in-browser preview
Test document upload/download/preview/delete across file types and permissions

user_stories.title: As a Project Manager, I want automatic version history for all documents so that I can view, compare, and restore previous versions
user_stories.description: Maintain automatic version history for all uploaded documents, allowing users to view previous versions, compare versions, and restore earlier versions.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a document is re-uploaded WHEN the upload completes THEN a new version is created automatically with the previous version preserved
GIVEN a document has multiple versions WHEN I view version history THEN I see a list of all versions with timestamps and uploaders
GIVEN version history is displayed WHEN I select a previous version THEN I can download or preview that version
GIVEN version history is displayed WHEN I click 'Restore' on a previous version THEN it becomes the current version

tasks.title: Build document versioning engine with version history, comparison, and restore APIs
Implement version history UI with list view, preview, and restore functionality
Test version creation, download, preview, and restore across file types

user_stories.title: As a Team Member, I want to comment and annotate on documents so that I can provide feedback directly on deliverables
user_stories.description: Support commenting and annotation on deliverables, allowing team members and clients to provide threaded feedback directly on documents with notifications.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN I am viewing a document WHEN I add a comment THEN it is saved and visible to other users with permissions
GIVEN a comment exists WHEN another user replies THEN a threaded reply is created under the original comment
GIVEN a new comment is added WHEN relevant users are watching the document THEN they receive a notification
GIVEN I am a Client User WHEN I comment on a deliverable THEN the project team sees the comment and can reply

tasks.title: Build document comment service with threading, notifications, and permission enforcement
Implement document annotation and commenting overlay with threaded replies
Test commenting and annotation across browsers, user roles, and notification delivery

user_stories.title: As a Project Manager, I want to submit deliverables for client approval through a formal workflow so that sign-offs are tracked
user_stories.description: Provide a client approval workflow for deliverables where documents can be submitted for client review and the client can approve, reject, or request changes with comments.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN I am a Project Manager WHEN I mark a deliverable as 'Submitted for Review' THEN the client receives a notification
GIVEN a Client User reviews a deliverable WHEN they click 'Approve' THEN the deliverable status changes to Approved with timestamp
GIVEN a Client User reviews a deliverable WHEN they click 'Reject' or 'Request Changes' THEN they must enter a comment explaining why
GIVEN a deliverable status changes WHEN I view the deliverables list THEN the current status (Draft, Submitted, Approved, Rejected, Changes Requested) is visible

tasks.title: Build deliverable approval workflow engine with status transitions and notification triggers
Implement deliverable submission and approval UI flow with status indicators
Test deliverable approval state transitions and edge cases

epics.description: Third-party integrations with QuickBooks (invoicing sync), Slack (notifications), Google Calendar (deadlines), Figma (design previews), and GitHub (commit activity).

user_stories.title: As a Finance Manager, I want finalized invoices to sync bi-directionally with QuickBooks so that our accounting system stays current
user_stories.description: Integrate with QuickBooks to synchronize finalized invoices including line items, client details, and payment status with bi-directional sync.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN an invoice is finalized WHEN sync runs THEN the invoice with line items and client details is pushed to QuickBooks
GIVEN a payment is recorded in QuickBooks WHEN sync runs THEN the payment status is reflected in the platform
GIVEN a sync error occurs WHEN the system logs it THEN the error is visible in the sync status dashboard with details
GIVEN invoices are syncing WHEN I check the sync log THEN I see timestamps, status, and any error details for each sync event

tasks.title: Build QuickBooks API client with OAuth2 flow, invoice push, and payment status pull with retry queue
Implement QuickBooks sync status dashboard with log viewer
Test QuickBooks sync data mapping, error handling, and retry behavior

user_stories.title: As a Team Member, I want to receive Slack notifications for project events so that I stay informed in my primary communication tool
user_stories.description: Send Slack notifications for configurable events including milestone approvals, new client comments, task assignments, approaching deadlines, and deliverable uploads.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN Slack integration is configured WHEN a configured event occurs THEN a notification is sent to the specified Slack channel or DM
GIVEN I am an Administrator WHEN I configure Slack integration THEN I can map event types to channels and DMs
GIVEN a notification is sent WHEN I view it in Slack THEN it contains a direct link back to the relevant item in the platform
GIVEN Slack is temporarily unavailable WHEN notifications fail THEN they are queued and retried automatically

tasks.title: Build Slack webhook/bot integration with event routing and retry queue
Implement Slack integration settings page with event-to-channel mapping
Test Slack notification delivery per event type and retry behavior

user_stories.title: As a Project Manager, I want project deadlines and milestones to sync with Google Calendar so that schedules are visible in my calendar
user_stories.description: Integrate with Google Calendar to sync project deadlines, milestone dates, and meeting schedules with automatic updates when project dates change.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN Google Calendar is connected WHEN a milestone date is set THEN a calendar event is created automatically
GIVEN a milestone date changes in the platform WHEN sync runs THEN the calendar event is updated accordingly
GIVEN I am a Team Member WHEN I connect my Google Calendar THEN I see project milestones and deadlines as events
GIVEN Google Calendar is temporarily unavailable WHEN sync fails THEN changes are queued and synced when available

tasks.title: Build Google Calendar API integration with OAuth, event CRUD, and auto-sync on date changes
Implement Google Calendar connection settings UI
Test calendar sync accuracy and bi-directional update handling

user_stories.title: As a Team Member, I want to link Figma files to projects with preview thumbnails so that design assets are accessible from the platform
user_stories.description: Provide Figma integration allowing linking of Figma project files to platform projects with embedded preview thumbnails in the document management system.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN I am within a project's documents WHEN I paste a Figma URL THEN the system validates and saves the link
GIVEN a Figma URL is linked WHEN I view the documents section THEN a thumbnail preview of the Figma design is displayed
GIVEN a thumbnail is displayed WHEN I click it THEN Figma opens in a new browser tab
GIVEN an invalid Figma URL is pasted WHEN I submit THEN a validation error is shown

tasks.title: Build Figma oEmbed/API integration for URL validation and thumbnail generation
Implement Figma link input with preview embed in document view
Test Figma URL validation, thumbnail rendering, and link navigation

user_stories.title: As a Team Lead, I want to view GitHub commit activity and PR status within the project dashboard so that I can track development progress
user_stories.description: Integrate with GitHub to display commit activity per project, showing recent commits, active branches, and pull request status within the project dashboard.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a GitHub repository is linked WHEN I view the project dashboard THEN I see recent commits, branches, and PR status
GIVEN the GitHub widget is displayed WHEN new commits are pushed THEN the display refreshes at configurable intervals
GIVEN I am an Administrator WHEN I link a GitHub repo THEN I authenticate via GitHub OAuth and select the repository
GIVEN a PR is open WHEN I view the GitHub widget THEN I see the PR title, status, and author

tasks.title: Build GitHub API client for commit, branch, and PR data retrieval with OAuth
Implement GitHub activity widget for project dashboard
Test GitHub integration display accuracy and data refresh

user_stories.title: As an Administrator, I want to configure the QuickBooks connection with OAuth, account mapping, and sync monitoring so that the integration runs reliably
user_stories.description: Provide a QuickBooks connection configuration interface for OAuth authentication, chart of accounts mapping, sync frequency configuration, and sync status monitoring.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN I am an Administrator WHEN I open QuickBooks settings THEN I can initiate an OAuth connection to QuickBooks
GIVEN QuickBooks is connected WHEN I configure account mapping THEN I can map internal invoice fields to QuickBooks accounts
GIVEN account mapping is complete WHEN I set a sync schedule THEN the system syncs at the configured intervals
GIVEN syncs are running WHEN I view the sync log THEN I see timestamps, records synced, and any errors

tasks.title: Build QuickBooks OAuth configuration API with account mapping and schedule management
Implement QuickBooks admin configuration panel with OAuth, mapping, and sync logs
Test QuickBooks OAuth flow, account mapping persistence, and sync schedule execution

epics.description: Executive dashboards, project profitability reports, configurable report exports, NPS tracking, AI-powered estimation, and advanced analytics.

user_stories.title: As an Executive, I want an executive dashboard displaying five core KPIs so that I have real-time operational visibility
user_stories.description: Provide an executive dashboard displaying revenue per client, project profitability, team utilization rates, on-time delivery percentage, and client satisfaction scores with drill-down capability.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN I am an Executive WHEN I open the executive dashboard THEN I see all five KPIs: revenue/client, profitability, utilization, on-time delivery, and NPS
GIVEN a KPI is displayed WHEN I click on it THEN I can drill down to the underlying data (e.g., profitability per project)
GIVEN the dashboard is loaded WHEN data changes THEN KPIs refresh in near-real-time without manual refresh
GIVEN I need to present data WHEN I view the dashboard THEN it is visually suitable for board meeting presentations

tasks.title: Build executive dashboard aggregation queries for all five KPIs with drill-down data
Implement executive dashboard UI with drill-down charts using Chart.js or Recharts
Test executive dashboard data accuracy, drill-down functionality, and performance

user_stories.title: As a Project Manager, I want project profitability reports with variance analysis so that I can identify budget overruns early
user_stories.description: Provide project profitability reports comparing actual hours and costs against quoted/budgeted values with variance analysis at project, client, and portfolio levels.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN I am a Project Manager WHEN I generate a profitability report THEN I see budget vs. actual for hours and cost per project
GIVEN the report is displayed WHEN variance exceeds a threshold THEN it is highlighted in red/amber as a warning
GIVEN I need to filter WHEN I select a date range, client, or project THEN the report updates to reflect the filter
GIVEN I want to share the report WHEN I export it THEN I can download as PDF, CSV, or Excel

tasks.title: Build report generation engine with variance calculations at project/client/portfolio levels
Implement report builder UI with parameter selection, variance highlighting, and chart visualizations
Test report calculation accuracy against raw data and export format validation

user_stories.title: As an Administrator, I want to export reports in multiple formats and schedule automated delivery so that stakeholders receive reports regularly
user_stories.description: Provide configurable reports with export functionality (PDF, CSV, Excel) and the ability to schedule automated report delivery via email.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a report is generated WHEN I click export THEN I can choose PDF, CSV, or Excel format
GIVEN I want regular reports WHEN I configure a schedule THEN the system sends the report via email at the configured frequency
GIVEN a scheduled report is due WHEN the system generates it THEN recipients receive an email with the report attached
GIVEN I am managing schedules WHEN I view scheduled reports THEN I see all active schedules with last run and next run times

tasks.title: Build PDF/CSV/Excel export service and scheduled report cron with email delivery
Implement export buttons and schedule configuration dialog for reports
Test export format integrity (PDF rendering, CSV/Excel data accuracy) and scheduled delivery

user_stories.title: As a Project Manager, I want to track and display NPS scores per project and client so that I can monitor client satisfaction trends
user_stories.description: Track and display client satisfaction scores (NPS) per project and per client, with the ability to record survey results and display trends over time.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN I am a Project Manager WHEN I record an NPS score for a project THEN it is saved with a timestamp
GIVEN NPS scores exist WHEN I view the NPS dashboard THEN I see a trend chart showing scores over time per client and project
GIVEN NPS scores are recorded WHEN I view the executive dashboard THEN the average NPS appears as a KPI widget
GIVEN I need historical data WHEN I filter by date range THEN the trend chart updates accordingly

tasks.title: Build NPS data model and aggregation service with trend calculations
Implement NPS entry form and trend chart with filtering
Test NPS trend chart data accuracy and executive dashboard integration

user_stories.title: As a Project Manager, I want AI-powered project estimation suggesting effort and timelines based on historical data so that I can plan new projects more accurately
user_stories.description: Provide AI-powered project estimation capabilities that analyze historical project data to suggest effort estimates, timelines, and resource requirements for new projects. Phase 2 feature — stub with data collection hooks.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN I am creating a new project WHEN I request an estimate THEN the system suggests hours, timeline, and team size based on similar past projects
GIVEN an estimate is provided WHEN I review it THEN I see confidence intervals and the similar projects it was based on
GIVEN the feature is Phase 2 WHEN the system is deployed THEN historical data collection hooks are active for future training
GIVEN the stub is deployed WHEN I access the estimation feature THEN I see a 'Coming in Phase 2' placeholder with data collection confirmation

tasks.title: Implement historical data collection hooks and feature flag for AI estimation stub
Build Phase 2 placeholder UI for AI estimation with data collection status
Verify data collection hooks capture necessary fields for future model training

user_stories.title: As an Executive, I want advanced analytics with trend analysis and predictive scoring so that I can make data-driven strategic decisions
user_stories.description: Provide advanced analytics including trend analysis, predictive project health scoring, revenue forecasting, and custom dashboard widgets beyond standard reports. Phase 2 feature — stub with data pipeline foundations.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the system has historical data WHEN I access advanced analytics THEN I see trend lines and predictive health scores
GIVEN custom dashboards are available WHEN I configure widgets THEN I can drag-and-drop to create personalized views
GIVEN the feature is Phase 2 WHEN the system is deployed THEN data pipeline foundations are in place for future analytics
GIVEN the stub is deployed WHEN I access advanced analytics THEN I see a 'Coming in Phase 2' placeholder with existing data pipeline info

tasks.title: Build advanced analytics data pipeline foundations and feature flag stub
Build Phase 2 placeholder UI for advanced analytics with pipeline status
Verify data pipeline foundations capture and store metrics for future analytics

epics.description: Role-based access control, two-factor authentication, audit trails, client data isolation, SSO with Google Workspace, password policies, and session management.

user_stories.title: As an Administrator, I want to define and enforce role-based access control with 7 predefined roles so that each user sees only what they are authorized to access
user_stories.description: Implement RBAC with predefined roles: Administrator, Executive, Project Manager, Team Lead, Team Member, Finance Manager, and Client User. Each role has specific permissions for viewing, creating, editing, and deleting resources.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN 7 roles are predefined WHEN an Administrator assigns a role to a user THEN the user can only perform actions permitted by that role
GIVEN a user has a role WHEN they attempt an action beyond their permissions THEN they receive an access denied error
GIVEN a Client User role WHEN the user logs in THEN they can only access projects belonging to their organization
GIVEN multiple roles exist WHEN an Administrator views the permission matrix THEN all roles and their permissions are displayed clearly

tasks.title: Build RBAC engine with 7 roles, permission matrix, and middleware enforcement
Implement role management UI and permission matrix display in admin panel
Test RBAC permission matrix validation across all 7 roles and edge cases

user_stories.title: As a User, I want to set up mandatory two-factor authentication so that my account is protected against unauthorized access
user_stories.description: Enforce mandatory 2FA for all users, supporting authenticator app (TOTP) and SMS-based verification methods with admin reset capability.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN I am a new user WHEN I log in for the first time THEN I am required to set up 2FA before accessing the platform
GIVEN I have 2FA enabled WHEN I log in THEN I must enter my password and a 2FA code
GIVEN I choose TOTP WHEN I set up 2FA THEN I scan a QR code with my authenticator app and verify with a code
GIVEN I am locked out of 2FA WHEN I contact an admin THEN the admin can reset my 2FA to allow re-enrollment

tasks.title: Build 2FA service with TOTP (speakeasy) and SMS (Twilio) support including admin reset
Implement 2FA setup wizard with QR code generation and SMS verification flow
Test 2FA enrollment, login flow, bypass attempts, and admin reset functionality

user_stories.title: As an Administrator, I want comprehensive audit trails of all user actions so that we can meet SOC2 compliance requirements
user_stories.description: Maintain comprehensive audit trails logging all user actions including data creation, modification, deletion, login/logout events, permission changes, and export activities with timestamps.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN any user performs an action WHEN the action modifies data THEN an immutable audit log entry is created with timestamp, user ID, action type, and before/after values
GIVEN audit logs exist WHEN an Administrator searches the logs THEN they can filter by user, date range, action type, and affected resource
GIVEN audit logs are needed for compliance WHEN an Administrator exports logs THEN they can be downloaded in CSV format
GIVEN audit logs are stored WHEN any attempt is made to modify them THEN the modification is blocked and an alert is triggered

tasks.title: Build audit trail event system with immutable log storage and search/export APIs
Implement audit log viewer in admin panel with search, filter, and export functionality
Test audit log completeness, immutability, search accuracy, and export integrity

user_stories.title: As a Client User, I want strict data isolation so that I can never see another client's data
user_stories.description: Ensure strict client data isolation so that client users can only view and interact with projects, documents, and data belonging to their organization with no cross-client data leakage.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN I am a Client User WHEN I access the portal THEN all queries are filtered to my tenant/organization
GIVEN I attempt to access another client's resource via URL manipulation WHEN the request is processed THEN I receive an access denied error
GIVEN the system is tested WHEN penetration tests are run THEN no cross-tenant data access is possible
GIVEN I am viewing any list of resources WHEN the results are displayed THEN only my organization's data appears

tasks.title: Implement tenant-scoped query filters across all data access layers
Ensure all UI data-fetching passes tenant context and handles isolation errors gracefully
Execute cross-tenant penetration tests and data isolation validation

user_stories.title: As an Internal User, I want to log in using my Google Workspace credentials via SSO so that I do not need a separate password
user_stories.description: Support Single Sign-On with Google Workspace using SAML 2.0 or OIDC protocols for internal user authentication with fallback to email/password.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN SSO is configured WHEN I click 'Sign in with Google' THEN I am authenticated via Google Workspace and redirected to the platform
GIVEN I am a first-time SSO user WHEN I sign in THEN my account is provisioned with the appropriate role
GIVEN Google Workspace is unavailable WHEN I try SSO THEN I can fall back to email/password login
GIVEN I am an Administrator WHEN I configure SSO THEN I can set the Google Workspace domain and enable/disable SSO

tasks.title: Build SSO service with SAML 2.0/OIDC for Google Workspace with email/password fallback
Implement SSO login button and admin SSO configuration UI
Test SSO authentication flow, first-time provisioning, fallback, and edge cases

user_stories.title: As a User, I want enforced password policies so that account security meets organizational standards
user_stories.description: Enforce password policies including minimum length (12 characters), complexity requirements, password expiry (90 days), and prevention of password reuse for the last 10 passwords.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN I am creating or changing a password WHEN the password is fewer than 12 characters or lacks complexity THEN a validation error is shown
GIVEN my password is 90 days old WHEN I log in THEN I am prompted to change my password before proceeding
GIVEN I am changing my password WHEN I enter one of the last 10 passwords THEN the system rejects it with an error
GIVEN my password is expiring soon WHEN I log in within 14 days of expiry THEN I see a warning notification

tasks.title: Build password policy engine with complexity, expiry, and reuse prevention logic
Implement password change flow with real-time complexity indicator and expiry warnings
Test password policy enforcement including all complexity rules, expiry, and reuse prevention

user_stories.title: As a User, I want automatic session timeout with a warning before expiry so that idle sessions do not pose a security risk
user_stories.description: Implement automatic session timeout after 30 minutes of inactivity with a warning prompt 5 minutes before session expiry allowing the user to extend their session.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN I am logged in WHEN I am inactive for 25 minutes THEN a warning modal appears with a countdown timer
GIVEN the warning modal is displayed WHEN I click 'Continue Session' THEN the session timer resets to 30 minutes
GIVEN the warning modal is displayed WHEN I do not respond within 5 minutes THEN I am logged out and redirected to the login page
GIVEN I was logged out due to timeout WHEN I log back in THEN I see a message explaining the session expired

tasks.title: Build session management service with inactivity tracking and timeout logic
Implement session timeout warning modal with countdown and extend session button
Test session timeout at 30 minutes, warning at 25 minutes, and session extension

epics.description: Responsive web application, global search, in-app notification center, and mobile app (Phase 2).

user_stories.title: As a User, I want the application to work responsively across desktop and tablet browsers so that I can use it on any supported device
user_stories.description: Deliver a responsive web application functioning correctly on Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge with a minimum viewport of 768px.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN I am on a desktop browser (1920px) WHEN I use the application THEN all features are fully functional with optimal layout
GIVEN I am on a tablet (768px) WHEN I use the application THEN all critical workflows are usable without horizontal scrolling
GIVEN I switch browsers (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge) WHEN I use the application THEN behavior and layout are consistent
GIVEN the application is responsive WHEN I resize the browser THEN the layout adapts smoothly between breakpoints

tasks.title: Audit and fix responsive layout across all breakpoints (768px-1920px)
Execute cross-browser responsive testing matrix (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge)
Ensure all API responses work correctly with responsive UI components

user_stories.title: As an Internal User, I want a global search that searches across projects, tasks, documents, and clients so that I can quickly find anything
user_stories.description: Provide global search functionality allowing users to search across projects, tasks, documents, and client records with RBAC-filtered results.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN I am logged in WHEN I type in the global search bar THEN I see autocomplete suggestions from projects, tasks, documents, and clients
GIVEN I submit a search query WHEN results are returned THEN they are categorized by type (project, task, document, client)
GIVEN I am a Team Member WHEN I search THEN I only see results I have permission to access
GIVEN I search for a term WHEN results exist THEN they display within 2 seconds

tasks.title: Build full-text search index across projects, tasks, documents, clients with RBAC filtering
Implement global search bar with autocomplete and categorized result display
Test search relevance, RBAC filtering accuracy, and performance under load

user_stories.title: As a User, I want an in-app notification center so that I can see real-time updates for task assignments, deadlines, and messages
user_stories.description: Provide an in-app notification center displaying real-time notifications for task assignments, mentions, approaching deadlines, approval requests, and client messages.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN I am logged in WHEN a relevant event occurs THEN a notification badge appears on the bell icon with unread count
GIVEN I click the notification bell WHEN the panel opens THEN I see notifications categorized and sorted by recency
GIVEN I read a notification WHEN I mark it as read THEN the unread count decreases
GIVEN I want to manage notifications WHEN I open preferences THEN I can configure which event types trigger notifications

tasks.title: Build WebSocket notification service with event dispatching and user preference management
Implement notification bell icon with dropdown panel, categories, and preference settings
Test notification delivery timing, preference enforcement, and real-time updates

user_stories.title: As a Team Member, I want a mobile-optimized native app for time tracking so that I can log hours on the go
user_stories.description: Provide a mobile-optimized native application focused on time tracking with start/stop timer, manual entry, and task assignment views. Phase 2 feature — stub with mobile-optimized API endpoints.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the Phase 2 mobile app is planned WHEN APIs are designed THEN mobile-optimized endpoints are documented and available
GIVEN I access the platform on mobile WHEN using the responsive web THEN time tracking features are usable at small viewports
GIVEN the stub is deployed WHEN mobile API endpoints are tested THEN they return correct data with minimal payload sizes
GIVEN Phase 2 is planned WHEN documentation is reviewed THEN mobile app API contracts are ready for native development

tasks.title: Document and build mobile-optimized API endpoints for time tracking and task views
Ensure responsive web time tracking is usable at mobile viewport widths
Test mobile API endpoints for payload size, response time, and correctness

epics.description: Admin panel for user management, role/permission configuration, integration settings, billing rate management, and user onboarding with email invitations.

user_stories.title: As an Administrator, I want a centralized admin panel to manage users, roles, integrations, and system settings so that I have full platform control
user_stories.description: Provide an administration panel for managing users, roles, permissions, system configuration, integration settings, billing rate configuration, and platform-wide settings.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN I am an Administrator WHEN I navigate to the admin panel THEN I see sections for Users, Roles, Integrations, Billing, and Settings
GIVEN I am managing users WHEN I create, edit, or deactivate a user THEN the changes take effect immediately
GIVEN I am managing roles WHEN I view the permission matrix THEN I can see and modify permissions per role
GIVEN I am configuring integrations WHEN I update QuickBooks or Slack settings THEN the configuration is saved and applied

tasks.title: Build admin panel API endpoints for user CRUD, role management, and system configuration
Implement admin panel layout with user management, role management, and settings screens
Test admin panel CRUD operations, role changes, and settings persistence

user_stories.title: As an Administrator, I want to invite users via email with predefined role assignments so that onboarding is streamlined
user_stories.description: Support user onboarding with email invitation workflow, allowing administrators to invite new internal users and client users with predefined role assignments.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN I am an Administrator WHEN I send an invitation THEN I specify the user's email and assign a role before sending
GIVEN an invitation is sent WHEN the invitee clicks the link THEN they are directed to set up their account and 2FA
GIVEN an invitation is pending WHEN the configurable expiry period passes THEN the invitation expires and can no longer be used
GIVEN I am managing invitations WHEN I view the invitation list THEN I see status (Pending, Accepted, Expired) for each

tasks.title: Build invitation service with email dispatch, token generation, expiry, and acceptance flow
Implement invitation form in admin panel and account setup page for invitees
Test invitation sending, acceptance, expiry, and role pre-assignment

epics.description: Bulk import of existing project data, client records, and historical time entries from CSV/Excel to facilitate migration from TechNova's spreadsheet-based system.

user_stories.title: As an Administrator, I want to bulk import project data, clients, and time entries from CSV/Excel so that historical data is migrated into the platform
user_stories.description: Support bulk import of existing project data, client records, and historical time entries from CSV/Excel files with validation, dry-run preview, and batch processing.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN I am an Administrator WHEN I open the import wizard THEN I can upload CSV or Excel files for projects, clients, or time entries
GIVEN I upload a file WHEN the system validates it THEN I see a report of valid records, warnings, and errors before committing
GIVEN validation passes WHEN I choose 'Dry Run' THEN I see a preview of the data as it would appear after import without actually importing
GIVEN I choose 'Import' WHEN the batch runs THEN records are imported transactionally and I see a progress indicator and final summary

tasks.title: Build CSV/Excel parser with validation engine, dry-run mode, and batch import transaction management
Implement data migration wizard with file upload, field mapping, validation results, and import progress
Test data migration with valid, invalid, and edge-case data files including large datasets

domain_specific_stories.title: As an Administrator, I want multi-tenancy data isolation configured from day one so that client data is never exposed across organizations
domain_specific_stories.description: Standard SaaS story: Ensure multi-tenant architecture with logical data separation between client organizations to support SOC2 confidentiality requirements. All database queries must include tenant context.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the database schema is designed WHEN tables contain client data THEN every table includes a tenant_id foreign key
GIVEN a query is executed WHEN it touches client-scoped data THEN the tenant_id filter is always applied at the ORM/query layer
GIVEN two tenants exist WHEN one tenant's user queries data THEN zero records from the other tenant appear
GIVEN the architecture is audited WHEN an engineer reviews the code THEN no raw SQL bypasses tenant isolation

tasks.title: Design and implement multi-tenant database schema with tenant_id on all client-scoped tables
Implement tenant context provider in frontend for all API requests
Write automated tests verifying tenant isolation across all data access endpoints

domain_specific_stories.title: As an Administrator, I want subscription and billing management so that we can manage client billing plans and payment tracking
domain_specific_stories.description: Standard SaaS story: Provide billing management for tracking client subscriptions, payment status, and billing plan configurations. Supports both flat-rate and usage-based billing models.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN I am an Administrator WHEN I view the billing management section THEN I see all clients with their billing plan, status, and payment history
GIVEN a client is onboarded WHEN I configure their billing THEN I can assign a billing plan and set billing frequency
GIVEN a billing cycle completes WHEN the system processes it THEN an invoice is generated and the client is notified
GIVEN a payment is overdue WHEN the grace period expires THEN the system flags the account and notifies the administrator

tasks.title: Build billing management service with subscription plans, payment tracking, and invoice generation
Implement billing management UI in admin panel
Test billing cycle processing, payment status updates, and overdue flagging

domain_specific_stories.title: As a new User, I want a guided onboarding experience so that I can quickly learn how to use the platform
domain_specific_stories.description: Standard SaaS story: Provide a first-login onboarding flow that guides new users through key platform features, completes required setup (2FA, profile), and provides contextual help for their role.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN I am a new user WHEN I log in for the first time THEN I am guided through a multi-step onboarding wizard
GIVEN the onboarding wizard starts WHEN I complete profile setup and 2FA THEN I see a role-specific tutorial highlighting key features
GIVEN I am a Client User WHEN the onboarding completes THEN I land on my project dashboard with contextual tooltips
GIVEN I skip the tutorial WHEN I navigate to any page THEN contextual help icons are available for key features

tasks.title: Build onboarding state tracker and role-specific tutorial content API
Implement multi-step onboarding wizard and contextual tooltip system
Test onboarding flow for all 7 user roles and tooltip display

domain_specific_stories.title: As an Administrator, I want platform health monitoring and system status so that I can proactively identify issues
domain_specific_stories.description: Standard SaaS story: Provide a system health dashboard showing API response times, error rates, storage usage, active user counts, and integration sync statuses for proactive monitoring.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN I am an Administrator WHEN I open the system health page THEN I see key metrics: API latency, error rate, active users, and storage usage
GIVEN the health page is displayed WHEN any metric exceeds its threshold THEN it is highlighted as a warning or critical alert
GIVEN integrations are configured WHEN I view sync statuses THEN I see the last sync time and current status for each integration
GIVEN a metric has historical data WHEN I view its chart THEN I see trend data for the last 24 hours, 7 days, and 30 days

tasks.title: Build system health metrics collection and aggregation service
Implement system health dashboard with metric charts and alert indicators
Test metric accuracy, threshold alerts, and historical trend data

domain_specific_stories.title: As an Administrator, I want to configure environment-specific settings for staging and production so that deployments are consistent and controlled
domain_specific_stories.description: Standard SaaS story: Provide environment configuration management for staging and production environments including feature flags, environment variables, and deployment settings.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN I am an Administrator WHEN I access environment settings THEN I see separate configuration for staging and production
GIVEN I toggle a feature flag WHEN I save THEN the feature is enabled/disabled in the target environment only
GIVEN environment variables are configured WHEN a deployment runs THEN the correct values are applied per environment
GIVEN I make a configuration change WHEN the change is saved THEN an audit log entry is created

tasks.title: Build environment configuration management service with feature flags and audit logging
Implement environment configuration UI with feature flag toggles
Test environment configuration isolation and feature flag enforcement

domain_specific_stories.title: As an Administrator, I want automated database backup and restore capabilities so that data is protected against loss
domain_specific_stories.description: Standard SaaS story: Implement automated database backup with configurable schedules, point-in-time recovery, and tested restore procedures meeting RPO/RTO requirements.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN backups are configured WHEN the scheduled time arrives THEN an automated backup runs and completes within the maintenance window
GIVEN a backup exists WHEN I need to restore THEN I can initiate a restore to any backup point within the retention period
GIVEN RPO is 1 hour WHEN measuring backup frequency THEN backups run at least every hour
GIVEN RTO is 4 hours WHEN a restore is initiated THEN the system is operational within 4 hours

tasks.title: Configure automated database backup service with hourly snapshots and retention policies
Build backup status and restore initiation UI in admin panel
Test backup execution, restore procedures, and RPO/RTO compliance

domain_specific_stories.title: As an Administrator, I want rate limiting and brute-force protection on authentication endpoints so that the platform is protected from attacks
domain_specific_stories.description: Standard SaaS story: Implement rate limiting on authentication endpoints to prevent brute-force attacks with account lockout after 5 failed attempts for 15 minutes.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user attempts login WHEN they fail 5 consecutive times THEN the account is locked for 15 minutes
GIVEN an account is locked WHEN the lockout period expires THEN the user can attempt login again
GIVEN auth endpoints are rate-limited WHEN more than 10 requests per minute come from one IP THEN excess requests are rejected with a 429 status
GIVEN an account is locked WHEN an Administrator views the user THEN they can manually unlock the account

tasks.title: Implement rate limiting middleware and account lockout logic on authentication endpoints
Display account lockout status and manual unlock option in admin panel
Test brute-force protection: 5 failed attempts lockout, rate limiting, and manual unlock

domain_specific_stories.title: As an Administrator, I want GDPR-compliant data management with data subject rights support so that we meet regulatory requirements
domain_specific_stories.description: Standard SaaS story: Implement GDPR compliance features including data subject access requests, data erasure (right to be forgotten), data portability, and consent management.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a data subject requests access WHEN an Administrator processes the request THEN a complete data export is generated within 30 days
GIVEN a data subject requests erasure WHEN processed THEN all personal data is anonymized or deleted while preserving audit trail integrity
GIVEN consent is required WHEN a user first accesses the platform THEN they see a consent dialog and their choice is recorded
GIVEN GDPR requests are tracked WHEN an Administrator views the request log THEN all requests are listed with status and resolution dates

tasks.title: Build GDPR data subject rights service with export, erasure, and consent tracking
Implement consent dialog, data request form, and GDPR request log in admin panel
Test data export completeness, erasure thoroughness, and consent enforcement
